About.title: Fernanda Rocha | About
About.subtitle: Designer, communicator, and creative problem solver based in Brazil.
About.description: I'm Fernanda Rocha, a designer and marketing professional passionate about building brands and experiences that connect. I work at the intersection of visual identity, UI/UX, and strategic communication — transforming ideas into functional and purposeful design.

Jobs.title: Fernanda Rocha | Projects
Jobs.subtitle: A selection of freelance and personal projects — branding, UI/UX, web, and content.

01.title: Photos: Luísa Sonza - Tuparendi
01.description: Photos of the artist Luísa Sonza - Tuparendi, Rio Grande do Sul, Brazil.

02.title: Media Kit: Renata Giaffredo
02.description: The material below is one of the projects I developed for influencer Renata Giaffredo (participant of Love Is Blind). For a period, I managed her full advisory through an agency, overseeing contracts, partnerships, and supporting the 360° management of her career.

03.title: Prati: Home & Decoration
03.description: Marketing campaign for Prati, focused on home and decoration products. I developed the concept, content creation, and social media management.
